Setup.title: Name Your Cottage
Setup.subtitle: Welcome! Choose a name for the cottage. It appears in the header, in emails, and on the calendar.
Setup.adminHint: This person becomes the cottage admin and is emailed a sign-in link.
Setup.adminSubtitle: Now set up the administrator — the first account, with full access.
Setup.errorAdminEmail: Please enter a valid admin email.
Setup.sentBody: You have been sent a link to sign in.
Setup.sentBodyNoEmail: Setup is complete. Email isn't configured yet, so your sign-in link was printed to the server console.

RoomSetup.title: Set up your rooms
RoomSetup.subtitle: Your cottage needs at least one room before anyone can book. Add as many as you like, then finish.
RoomSetup.editLater: You can add, edit or remove rooms anytime later on the Admin page.
RoomSetup.roomsAdded: {count, plural, one {# room added} other {# rooms added}}
RoomSetup.noRoomsBody: This cottage has no rooms yet. An admin needs to add at least one before you can book.

Errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Errors.conflict: The selected dates conflict with an existing booking.

Auth.magicLinkSubtitle: Enter your email — we'll send a one-tap sign-in link.
Auth.magicLinkInsteadLink: Sign in with email link instead
Auth.credentialsSubtitle: Email + password sign-in for accounts that prefer it.
Auth.checkEmailBody: If an account exists for that address, we've sent a sign-in link. It expires in one hour.
Auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
Auth.resetSubtitle: Pick a strong password — at least 12 characters.
Auth.resetDoneBody: You can now sign in with your new password.
Auth.resetInvalidBody: This reset link has expired or already been used. Request a new one to continue.

Book.title: New Booking
Book.subtitle: Pick the dates, then choose how to share the cottage.
Book.fullyBookedNote: Greyed-out days are fully booked. Click one to see who is staying. A yellow dot marks days with requests awaiting approval.
Book.warnPendingCottage: {names} requested the whole cottage for these dates. It's awaiting approval, so a booking of your own may be declined.
Book.warnPendingRooms: Some rooms have requests awaiting approval for these dates — marked with an amber dot. Booking them may be declined.
Book.dayDetailsEmpty: No active reservations for this day.
Book.fullCottageDescription: The cottage is yours alone — every room and bed included.
Book.fullCottageBlocked: Unavailable because at least one room or bed is already booked.
Book.guestPlaceholder: Type a name or pick a person
Book.pendingCount: {count, plural, one {# pending request} other {# pending requests}}
Book.noDates: Choose check-in and check-out dates in the calendar.
Book.summaryNoSelection: Choose dates and at least one room or bed.
Book.editSubtitle: Change the dates or who stays where, then save.
Book.editSuccessBody: Your changes are saved and visible to everyone on the dashboard.
Book.successBody: Confirmed instantly — it is now visible to everyone on the dashboard.
Book.pendingBodyOne: {name} has to approve your request before it is confirmed. You can see it on the dashboard with a pending badge.
Book.pendingBodyTwo: {a} or {b} has to approve your request before it is confirmed. You can see it on the dashboard with a pending badge.
Book.pendingBodyMany: A booking manager has to approve your request before it is confirmed. You can see it on the dashboard with a pending badge.
Book.roomBedsHint: Drop a person onto a bed. A double sleeps two but is reserved whole — pick it and the spare side stays yours.

Dashboard.title: Cottage Calendar
Dashboard.subtitle: Who is at {cottage} and when.
Dashboard.confirmCancelBooking: Cancel the entire booking for everyone?

Requests.title: Booking Requests
Requests.subtitle: Pending bookings waiting for your approval.
Requests.conflictNote: {count, plural, =2 {These two requests overlap and can't both be approved — approving one means rejecting the other.} other {These requests overlap and can't all be approved — approving one may mean rejecting the others.}}
Requests.approveConflictMessage: {count, plural, =1 {Approving this booking will reject the other conflicting request.} other {Approving this booking will reject the # other conflicting requests.}}

CalendarExport.title: Export Calendar
CalendarExport.intro: Pick a scope, then download a one-off file or copy a subscription URL that updates automatically.
CalendarExport.scopeMeDescription: Only bookings where you are a participant or the booker.
CalendarExport.scopeAllDescription: Every confirmed booking on the cottage.
CalendarExport.copyFailed: Could not copy. Long-press the URL instead.

Groups.title: Groups
Groups.subtitle: Reusable templates for the same people in the same rooms — your household, your hiking buddies, etc.
Groups.emptyMyGroups: You aren't in any groups yet.
Groups.noMembers: No members yet — add the first one below.
Groups.addMemberPlaceholder: Pick a user or type a guest name
Groups.confirmRemoveSelf: Leave this group? You'll lose access to it unless another member adds you back.
Groups.cannotRemoveLastSelf: You're the last registered member — add someone else first.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.notifyEnabledHint: Turn on to receive email updates.
Settings.notifyBookingHint: Get an email when bookings you created are approved, rejected, or deleted.
Settings.notifyRequestsHint: Get an email whenever someone requests a booking.
Settings.passwordSetHint: You currently sign in via the email link. Set a password if you'd like the option to sign in with one.
Settings.deleteAccountHint: Permanently delete your account, along with your bookings and group memberships. This cannot be undone.
Settings.confirmDeleteAccount: Delete your account? This permanently removes your account, bookings and group memberships.

Dugnad.title: Volunteer Tasks
Dugnad.subtitle: Shared upkeep work. Post a task or claim one and mark it done.
Dugnad.newTitlePlaceholder: Short title — e.g. Paint the deck
Dugnad.newDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe what needs doing, materials, time, etc.
Dugnad.endOfList: You have seen every completed task.
Dugnad.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Admin.title: Admin
Admin.subtitle: Manage rooms and admins.
Admin.confirmKickUser: Remove {name} from the app? This permanently deletes their account, bookings and group memberships.

Invite.title: Invite People
Invite.subtitle: Share a link or email an invitation directly. Either way, the person who accepts gets their own account.
Invite.emailHint: We'll email them the invite link. They only need to type their name to finish signing up.
Invite.errorEmailRequired: Enter an email address to send the invite to.
Invite.emptyMyInvites: You haven't created any invites yet.
Invite.acceptSubtitle: Pick a name to display and the email you'll sign in with.
Invite.acceptSubtitleBound: Pick a name to display — your email is already on the invitation.
Invite.acceptInvalidBody: This invitation has expired, been revoked, or already been used. Ask for a fresh link.
